name: Paradiso
summary: World-famous Barcelona cocktail bar in El Born, best treated as a destination night rather than a casual drop-in.
whyItMatters: Barcelona has a serious cocktail scene; Paradiso is the splashiest pick and pairs naturally with an El Born evening.
pros: Official site confirms Paradiso as a Barcelona cocktail venue.
The World's 50 Best Bars history places Paradiso among recent global leaders, supporting destination value.
cons: Official page did not expose clean current hours in the fetched HTML; verify before use.

logistics.opening_hours: Needs final verification on official site/social channels.

logistics.transit: El Born/Gothic Quarter area; verify metro or taxi from lodging.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Barcelona race days may affect city movement; verify local TDF notices.

timing.best_visit_window: Late evening on a Barcelona night when no early next-day transfer is planned.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium on Jul 4-5, 2026 due to TDF crowds and city-center movement.
